name: Pudding Cake Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray a 15x10-1/2 x 1-inch jelly roll pan with nonstick cooking spray. Line the pan with wax paper and spray the paper; set aside.
3. Sift together flour and baking powder in a bowl.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs until frothy. Gradually beat in sugar until thick, lemon-colored, and doubled in volume (about 2 minutes).
5. Fold in the flour mixture into the egg mixture.
6. Spread batter evenly in the paper-lined pan.
7. Bake for 10 minutes or until the cake springs back when lightly touched with fingers.
8. Turn cake onto a kitchen towel; remove and discard wax paper. Starting at the narrow end, roll the cake tightly around the towel.
9. Set rolled cake on a wire rack to cool.
10. Prepare pudding according to package directions using 2 cups milk.
11. Unroll cooled cake and remove towel. Spread pudding over the surface of the cake, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
12. Reroll the cake and place the seam side down on a serving platter. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
13. Loosely cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled (about 30 minutes). Garnish with lemon peel.
Each serving provides: 1/2 protein exchange; 1/2 bread exchange; 1/2 milk exchange; 50 optional calories.
Per serving: 150 calories; 6 g protein; 3 g fat; 24 g carbohydrate; 118 mg calcium; 285 mg sodium; 138 mg cholesterol.
